briefdescription.para: Applies pressure methods based on data in PressureDataWv.

detaileddescription.para: This function gets called by TP_RecordTP. It also gets called when the approach button is pushed. A key point is that data acquisition used to run pressure pulses cannot be active if the TP is inactive.

briefdescription.para: Record pressure in TPStorage wave.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave wv, variable row, variable col, string name)
memberdef.name: P_FindLastSetEntry

briefdescription.para: Return the last non-NaN entry from the wave's column col and layer name starting from the row row going to 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage, variable oldMethod, variable newMethod)
memberdef.name: P_PublishPressureMethodChange

briefdescription.para: Sets the pressure to atmospheric.
Applies approach pressures.
Applies seal methods.
Applies break-in method.
Applies pipette clearing method.
Applies updates the command voltage to the SEAL_POTENTIAL when SEAL_RESISTANCE_THRESHOLD is crossed.
Updates the command voltage.
Determines which devices to close. Ensures all DA_Ephys panels using a particular device for pressure regulation are updated correctly.
Open device used for pressure regulation.
Adapt the ITC DAQ waves for hardware specialities.
Used to close the device used for pressure regulation.
Returns a list of rows that contain a particular string.
Returns a list of ITC/NI devices to open.

detaileddescription.para: Pulls a non repeating list of ITC/NI devices to open from the device specific pressure data wave.

briefdescription.para: Sets the pressure on a headStage.
Returns pressure access defined in PRESSURE_CONSTANTS of the headstage.

parameterdescription.para: The DAQ device for which user access is being queried
MIES headstage number, must be in the range [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES]
One of the pressure modes defined in PRESSURE_CONSTANTS

briefdescription.para: Maps the access (defined in PRESSURE_CONSTANTS) to the TTL settings.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headStage, variable ONorOFFA, variable ONorOFFB)
memberdef.name: P_UpdateTTLstate

briefdescription.para: Updates the TTL channel associated with headStage while maintaining existing channel states.

detaileddescription.para: When setting TTLs, all channels are set at once. To keep existing TTL state on some channels, active state must be known. This function queries the hardware to determine the active state.
ITC hardware: This requires the TTL out to be looped back to the TTL in on the ITC DAC.
NI hardware: There are no dedicated input or output channels for DIO. The last written value is read according to documentation.

briefdescription.para: Updates resistance slope and the resistance in PressureDataWv from TPStorageWave param.
Updates the pressure state (approach, seal, break in, or clear) from DA_Ephys panel to the pressureData wave.

xrefdescription.para: Needs to be reworked for specific controls and allow the value to be directly passed in with an optional parameter

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the parameters stored in the PressureData wave and passes them to the GUI controls.
Updates the popupmenu popup_Settings_Pressure_dev.
Initiates a pressure pulse who's settings are are controlled in the manual tab of the pressure regulation controls.
Sends a negative pressure pulse to the pressure regulator. Gates the TTLs apropriately to maintain the exisiting TTL state while opening the TTL on the channel with the pressure pulse.
Initiates a positive pressure pulse to the pressure regulator. Gates the TTLs apropriately to maintain the exisiting TTL state while opening the TTL on the channel with the pressure pulse.
Check wether the given device is used as pressure device already.
Perform an acquisition cycle on the pressure device for pressure control.
Monitor the device FIFO and terminates acquisition when sufficient data has been collected.
Returns the device of the device associated with device conducting a pressure pulse.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headStage, variable pressureMode, P_PressureDA *p)
memberdef.name: P_GetPressureForDA

briefdescription.para: Fill the passed structure with pressure details for the DA wave.
Updates the DA data used for ITC controlled pressure devices for a negative pressure pulse.
Returns the negative pressure pulse amplitude.
Returns the pulse count.
Updates the DA data used for ITC controlled pressure devices for a positive pressure pulse.
Updates the DA data used for ITC controlled pressure devices for a manual pressure pulse.
Updates the rack 0 and rack 1 TTL waves used for ITC controlled pressure devices.

memberdef.argsstring: (string pressureDevice, variable dec, variable ttlBit, variable ONorOFF)
memberdef.name: P_UpdateTTLdecimal

briefdescription.para: returns the new TTL state based on the starting TTL state.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable pressureMode, string pressureControlName, variable checkALL)
memberdef.name: P_UpdatePressureMode

briefdescription.para: Updates the pressure mode button state in the DA_Ephys Data Acq tab.
Resets pressure data to base state.
Applies pressure mode to all headstages with valid pressure settings.
Colors and changes the title of the pressure buttons based on the saved pressure mode.
Sets the pressure toggle buttons to disabled, default color, default title.
Checks if the Approach button can be enabled or all pressure mode buttons can be enabled. Enables buttons that pass checks.
updates the tablabels for the pressure tabControl according to the pressure mode
Checks if all the pressure settings for a headStage are valid.

simplesect.para: 1 if all settings are valid, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Determines if device is active (i.e. collecting data)

detaileddescription.para: used to determine if pressure pulse has completed.

briefdescription.para: Return true if pressure methods can be used on that headstage now.

detaileddescription.para: Does not check if the headstage has valid settings, see P_ValidatePressureSetHeadstage(), or that no pressure pulse is currently ongoing, see P_DACIsCollectingData().

briefdescription.para: Determines headStage is on and in V-Clamp mode.
Returns the four pressure buttons to the base state (gray color; removes "Stop" string from button title)
Enables devices for all locked DA_Ephys panels. Sets the correct pressure button state for all locked DA_Ephys panels.
Disables devices for all locked DA_Ephys panels. Sets the correct pressure button state for all locked DA_Ephys panels.
Decimal to binary in 8bit wave.

detaileddescription.para: Wave is always 4 rows long so that each TTL channel on the front of the ITC DAC gets "encoded"

briefdescription.para: Manual pressure control.
Saves user seleted headstage in pressureData wave.
Sets all headstage to atmospheric pressure.
Gets the pressure mode for a headstage.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headStage, variable pressureMode, variable pressure=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: P_SetPressureMode

briefdescription.para: Sets the pressure mode.

detaileddescription.para:
Intended for use by other processes
device
device
headStage
MIES headstage number, must be in the range [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES]
pressureMode
One of the pressure modes defined in PressureModeConstants
pressure
[optional, ignored by default. Sets pressure of manual mode]

briefdescription.para: Approach button.
Sets approach state.

detaileddescription.para: Handles the TP depency of the approach pressure application

briefdescription.para: Seal button.
Break in button.
Clear button.
Handles the TP depency of the Manual pressure application.
Clear all check box.
Update DAC list button.
Pressure control device Enable button in Hardware tab of DA_Ephys panel.
Pressure control device Disable button in Hardware tab of DA_Ephys panel.
Set pressure button.
Manual pressure pulse button.
Runs P_PressureControl if the TP is OFF.
If auto-user-OFF is checked, then user access is turned off this function is run by the active headstage slider control.
Sets the value of the headstage LED valDisplays to the correct cell in pressureType wave.
Encodes the pressure type for each headstage.
P Supports use of analog pressure regulators controlled via a ITC device for automated pressure control during approach, seal, break in, and clearing of pipette.

xrefdescription.para: TPbackground can crash while operating pressure regulators if called in the middle of a TP. Need to call P_Pressure control from TP functions that occur between TPs to prevent this from happening
